meta.title: TERROIR — Specialty Coffee
meta.description: Single origin, small batch, roasted with intention.

props.heading: Time shapes flavor.
props.subheading: We source single-origin beans from small farms, roast them by hand in small batches, and let time do its work. No rush. No compromise.

testimonials.quote: Every bean carries the story of its soil, its climate, and the hands that nurtured it.
testimonials.name: Terroir Roasters

items.title: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
items.description: The birthplace of coffee. Grown at 1,900 meters under the shade of native trees. Expect floral notes, bright citrus, and a silky body.

items.title: Colombia Huila
items.description: Grown at 1,800 meters. These beans undergo extended fermentation, developing complexity and sweetness. Notes of stone fruit, caramel, and chocolate.

items.title: Guatemala Antigua
items.description: Volcanic soil produces beans of remarkable depth. Family cultivated at 1,600 meters. Cocoa, brown sugar, and a hint of smoke.

props.heading: The Process: From seed to cup
props.subheading: We believe in transparency. Every step happens here, by hand, with intention.

features.title: 01 Sourcing
features.description: We travel to origin, cup hundreds of samples, and build relationships with farmers.

features.title: 02 Green Storage
features.description: Beans rest in climate-controlled conditions, preserving their potential.

features.title: 03 Roasting
features.description: Small batches, precise heat. We highlight each origin's unique qualities.

features.title: 04 Resting
features.description: We let our beans rest for at least 48 hours before packaging.

props.heading: Coffee, delivered.
props.subheading: Stay stocked. Choose your frequency and we'll send freshly roasted beans to your door.

props.description: Handcrafted specialty coffee. Single origin, small batch.
